  • Classes in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums used by com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller
    Class
    Description
    CellState
    Represents the visual and logical state of a single board cell.
    GameState
    Represents the overall phase the current match is in.
    Orientation
    Represents the orientation a ship can have on the board.
    ShipType
    Defines the four ship categories available in the fleet, along with the number of cells each ship occupies and how many units of that type must be placed on a single board.
  • Classes in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums used by com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency
    Class

    Represents the visual and logical state of a single board cell.
